title: A walk to school
description: For each question, write the correct answer. Write one word for each gap.

content.text: I usually take the bus to school, but last Monday I decided to walk instead. The weather was bright and fresh, and I left home earlier (27) usual. At first, I thought the walk would be boring, but I soon began to enjoy it. I passed a small park where children were playing and birds were singing (28) the trees. On the way, I met a friend who was also walking to school, so we continued together. We talked (29) our plans for the weekend and arrived in a good mood. Walking took longer than the bus, although it was much more relaxing. I felt more awake (30) I reached school, and I was able to concentrate better in my first lesson. Since then, I have walked to school several times. I think it is good (31) my health and also kinder (32) the environment.
